side_effects.description: Copper sting/burning at injection site lasting up to 10 hours; not present on first vial, appeared on second vial

protocol_notes: First 50mg vial completed with no injection site sting. Second 50mg vial from same purchase/company began producing copper sting. By day 4 of second vial, rotating injection sites; some injections no longer sting. Purchased from reseller websites as a beginner. Had a COA.
